# QC-07: AI Output Validation

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

For changes involving AI systems: execute hallucination detection tests, accuracy benchmarking against defined thresholds, output consistency tests across equivalent inputs, and boundary condition tests. Results feed into the RC-05 risk threshold evaluation. Not applicable to changes with no AI component.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 4 | Testing & Documentation | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent executes, human reviews |
| **Agent does** | Execute AI validation test suite; measure hallucination rate, accuracy, and consistency. |
| **Human does** | Review AI validation results; determine if accuracy thresholds are acceptable for release. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| AI Act risk tier classification | AC-01 | Determines the depth and scope of AI validation required. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| AI output validation report | evidence | Hallucination detection results, accuracy scores, consistency test results, and boundary test outcomes. | 7 years (AI Act) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | AI Governance Lead |

AI systems failing accuracy thresholds cannot proceed to production.

## Dependencies

- `QC-04`
- `AC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| EU AI Act | Art. 15(1) | Accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity requirements for high-risk AI systems |
| EU AI Act | Art. 9(7) | Testing to identify appropriate risk management measures for AI systems |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** AI Governance · **Owner role:** AI Governance Lead
